title: Catopia
description: A mod for Forge 1.20.1 that adds a cat dimension, 2 new ores, 1 new wood type, 1 new mob, 1 new structure, a few new blocks, and a whole lotta cats.
body:
This is a mod for Forge 1.20.1, which adds 1 new liquid type, 1 new dimension, 2 new ores, 2 new tool sets, 3 new armor sets, a new wood type, a new boss, _**and a whole lotta cats.**_


this mod was made as a joke.
